mapper.select: SELECT A.MTRL_CD as mtrlCd, C.MTRL_NM as mtrlNm, A.STOCK_QTY as stockQty, A.AGNT_CD as agntCd, D.AGNT_NM AS agntNm FROM TBL_STOCK A, TBL_WH_LOC_M B, TBL_MTRL_M C, TBL_AGENCY_M D WHERE A.LOC_ID = B.LOC_ID AND A.MTRL_CD = C.MTRL_CD AND A.AGNT_CD = D.AGNT_CD AND A.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND B.LOC_CD = #{locationCd} AND A.STOCK_QTY > 0
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO TBL_STOCK AS target USING (SELECT #{cmpyCd} as cmpyCd, (SELECT LOC_ID FROM TBL_WH_LOC_M WHERE LOC_CD = #{toLocationCd}) as loc, #{mtrlCd} as mtrl) AS source ON (target.CMPY_CD = source.cmpyCd AND target.LOC_ID = source.loc AND target.MTRL_CD = source.mtrl) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET STOCK_QTY = target.STOCK_QTY + #{moveQty}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{userId} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (CMPY_CD, AGNT_CD, MTRL_CD, ZONE_ID, LOC_ID, STOCK_QTY, UPDT_TIME, UPDT_USER) VALUES (#{cmpyCd}, #{agntCd}, #{mtrlCd}, (SELECT LOC_ID FROM TBL_WH_LOC_M WHERE LOC_CD = #{toLocationCd}), #{moveQty}, GETDATE(), #{userId});

INSERT INTO TBL_STOCK_MOVE_LOG ( CMPY_CD, AGNT_CD, MTRL_CD, FROM_LOC_ID, TO_LOC_ID, MOVE_QTY, MOVE_TYPE, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_USER ) VALUES ( #{cmpyCd}, #{agntCd}, #{mtrlCd}, (SELECT LOC_ID FROM TBL_WH_LOC_M WHERE LOC_CD = #{fromLocationCd}), (SELECT LOC_ID FROM TBL_WH_LOC_M WHERE LOC_CD = #{toLocationCd}), #{moveQty}, ISNULL(#{moveType}, 'NORMAL'), GETDATE(), #{userId} )
